productDisplayName: Fila Men's Swinger White Navy Shoe
description: Well cushioned and lightweight, the running shoes are designed to offer a comfortable running experience coupled with style. Team this with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic with mesh for maximum durability Synthetic overlays for durability, added structure to the upper and midfoot support Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Reinforced overlay over toe box for durability and added protection to the forefoot Synthetic laces for durability, with an extra pair Padded tongue with synthetic and mesh upper overlay for durability and meshed fabric lining below for comfort and breathability Cushioned sock liner for in step comfort and snug Fit Brand name on side and tongue Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned EVA foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfort Outsole Outsole with rubber spikes for excellent grip on hard ground, like tennis court Trustic unit made of durable rubber with vacuum scoop extended to the sides for complete inner arch support shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
